prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in `apache/kafka` that implement or define Access Control List (ACL) authorization logic. Search under `core/src/main/` and `clients/src/main/` for files containing classes or interfaces with `Authorizer` or `AclAuthorizer` in the name. For each file, report the class name and whether it defines the interface, implements it, or provides test utilities.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
